CustomField.description: Idempotency gate for the FSC audit rebalance utility. Set to TRUE by FscLoanRebalanceOnce after a successful rebalance write; future runs skip records where this is TRUE.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by the audit rebalance utility. TRUE means this record has already been rebalanced and should not be processed again.
CustomField.label: Is Rebalanced
